feature_description: Bug-fix: Forecast Backtesting Historical Window (Days) input forces a leading '1' on clear because the onChange handler clamps Number('') === 0 to Math.max(1, 0) === 1 and writes it back into controlled state. Fix: allow transient empty draft, clamp on blur, fall back to 30 if empty.

validation.method: Inline by orchestrator — RCA fully designed (root cause + acceptance criteria + concrete fix); single-file change; architect dispatch skipped per nw-bugfix convention.

phases.name: Regression test + fix
phases.description: Add the failing regression test that proves the bug exists, then implement the clamp-on-blur fix and rewrite the two legacy clamp-on-change tests.

steps.name: Add regression test for clear-and-retype behaviour
steps.description: Add a Vitest test in BacktestForecaster.test.tsx that proves the bug exists: when the Historical Window (Days) input is cleared and then a digit is typed, the input must display the typed digit alone — not '1' prepended. With the current implementation this test FAILS because state snaps to 1 on the empty change.
criteria: New test added to BacktestForecaster.test.tsx that simulates clearing the field and typing a single digit (e.g. '5').
Test asserts the input value is '5' after the sequence (number, not string '15').
Test FAILS against current HEAD code (proves the bug).
Test name clearly describes the bug scenario.
No production code changes in this step — test-only.
steps.scenario_name: allows the user to clear the field and type a new value without prepending the minimum
quality_gates: pnpm vitest run src/pages/Teams/Detail/BacktestForecaster.test.tsx — new test FAILS, others pass
steps.implementation_notes: Use userEvent.clear + userEvent.type to faithfully reproduce keystroke behaviour (fireEvent.change overwrites and would mask the bug). Assert toHaveValue(5).

steps.name: Implement clamp-on-blur fix and rewrite legacy clamp-on-change tests
steps.description: Change state type to number | '' to allow a transient empty draft. Replace per-keystroke clamp with raw parsing in onChange. Add onBlur handler that clamps to [1, 365], falling back to 30 when empty. Guard handleRunBacktest. Rewrite the two existing clamp-on-change tests to assert clamping on BLUR.
criteria: BacktestForecaster.tsx: state historicalWindowDays typed as number | '' with default 30.
BacktestForecaster.tsx: onChange stores raw parsed value ('' stays '', other strings → Number).
BacktestForecaster.tsx: new onBlur handler clamps to [1, 365] and falls back to 30 if empty.
BacktestForecaster.tsx: handleRunBacktest treats '' / non-finite as 30 before computing historicalStartDate.
BacktestForecaster.test.tsx: the two legacy clamp tests are rewritten to fire blur and assert clamped value on blur.
BacktestForecaster.test.tsx: regression test from step 01-01 now PASSES.
pnpm test green; pnpm build green (Biome + tsc + vite, zero warnings).
steps.scenario_name: clamps historical window days on blur
quality_gates: pnpm --filter Lighthouse.Frontend test — full suite green
steps.implementation_notes: Reference fix sketch in rca.md. Keep slotProps.htmlInput.min/max as final safety net. Do NOT introduce a wrapper component or refactor other numeric inputs.
